scripts.test:dev:smoke: cross-env TARGET_ENV=dev npx cypress run --env grepTags=@smoke
scripts.test:dev:regression: cross-env TARGET_ENV=dev npx cypress run --env grepTags=@regression
scripts.test:dev:both: npm run test:dev:smoke && npm run test:dev:regression
scripts.test:int:smoke: cross-env TARGET_ENV=int npx cypress run --env grepTags=@smoke
scripts.test:int:regression: cross-env TARGET_ENV=int npx cypress run --env grepTags=@regression
scripts.test:int:both: npm run test:int:smoke && npm run test:int:regression
scripts.test:both: npm run test:dev && npm run test:int
